description_long: This arcade game cabinet features a classic upright design with a wood-textured finish and vibrant, cartoonish artwork. The front panel displays a large rectangular screen area, a control panel with two yellow buttons and a joystick, and a coin slot below. The marquee at the top reads 'SLAPPY VAN WINKLE' and is adorned with playful, colorful graphics of a whimsical character. Both side panels are decorated with the same lively illustration of an elderly man in a hat, surrounded by comic-style bursts and pastel backgrounds. The back of the cabinet is plain black with access panels, contrasting with the more decorative front and sides. The overall build suggests a sturdy, heavy structure typical of vintage arcade machines.
description: A classic upright arcade game cabinet with wood-textured panels, colorful cartoon artwork, and a prominent 'SLAPPY VAN WINKLE' marquee. The front features a screen, control panel, and coin slot, while the sides are decorated with playful graphics.
description_view_0: Front view showing the screen, control panel with buttons and joystick, coin slot, and the 'SLAPPY VAN WINKLE' marquee.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full cartoon artwork of the elderly man and the colorful background.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain black panel with access doors and no decorative elements.
description_view_3: Right side view, identical to the left, featuring the same cartoon artwork and color scheme.
attribute_screen_type: CRT display, flat front with a visible bezel, medium size typical of classic arcade cabinets.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one joystick and two yellow buttons, arranged in a simple horizontal row with a labeled area.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the text 'SLAPPY VAN WINKLE' in playful, bold letters with a cartoon character and pastel background, matching the whimsical theme of the cabinet.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels display large, colorful cartoon artwork of an elderly man in a hat with comic-style bursts and a pastel background, matching the game's playful theme.
